title: LightGBM DART mode for sparse-event fold regularization
why: DART applies dropout to boosting rounds, reducing overfitting on the small event counts typical of meta-labeling (30-80 events/fold). A parameter-swap from lgbm. May be redundant if lgbm + L2 already regularizes well — evaluate after B0053 lands.
value_rationale: Marginal regularization improvement; low effort if lgbm already in stack
